arts.sum: Barcelona are eager for one of their wingers to leave before the closure of the transfer window. Hansi Flick's side are interested in a potential loan move for Manchester United's Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: ‘We need fresh legs’ - Flick hints at resting Pedri, vows to make changes against Valencia
arts.sum: The Blaugrana have already played a ton of big games this January with pretty much the same starting XI, so it’s natural to wonder if coach Hansi Flick will be making any changes to his team on Sunday’s La Liga clash with relegation candidates Valencia. Flick was asked about potential rotations in a press conference on Saturday, and he confirmed that he indeed plans to make some changes to the team, including resting his best and most important player, midfielder Pedri.

arts.sum: Barcelona may have managed to tie Ronald Araujo down to a new contract, but he will still be available in the summer, according to Spanish media. REVEALED: Ronald Araujo's SHOCK new Barcelona release clause
